title: Protecting Women’s Private Spaces Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
crs_summary: Protecting Women’s Private Spaces Act This bill prohibits a person from accessing or using single-sex restrooms, locker rooms, or changing rooms on federal property other than those corresponding to such person's biological sex.  This prohibition does not apply to (1) emergency medical personnel responding to a medical emergency, or (2) law enforcement officers in active pursuit of a suspect or as part of an active investigation.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
